programme.title: A Prayer For Compassion
programme.desc: An inspirational documentary about the importance of expanding your circle of compassion in life.

programme.title: Blue World Ep507: Sand Tiger Sharks + Marine Biology in Turks Caicos
programme.desc: Blue World heads to North Carolina to observe how shipwrecks have become home to thousands of animals, including Sand Tiger sharks. But instead of chasing the fish, the sharks are protecting them! Then, we visit the School for Field Studies in the Turks Caicos Islands to learn how to tag sharks!

programme.title: Hot Water Ep104: V8 Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports. This episode features Round 4 of Jet Sprinting from Cabarita in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep110
programme.desc: Liquid Edge examines the subject of surf territorialism and the Aloha Spirit; the beauty and challenge of stand-up paddling in Tahiti; extreme whitewater kayaking. Included is an amazing look behind the scenes of the 3D movie adventure Storm Surfers, plus a spectacular kiteboarding sweet spot.

programme.title: Whales In A Changing Ocean
programme.desc: Wildlife cinematographer Richard Sidey joins an international team of whale research scientists in Antarctica to document their work on how humpback whales adapt to a changing ocean.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep108: North Pole
programme.desc: The Travel Quest crew takes an icebreaker to the North Pole just in time to make a satellite phone call to wish Bill's mother a happy birthday (she is so shocked she doesn't recognize him). We also track and film the biggest predators on earth…polar bears.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: In-Depth Look at Brook Trout in West Virginia
programme.desc: We learn about Brook Trout with West Virginia DNR Fisheries Biologist, Brandon Keplinger, TU's Dustin Wichterman, and their children.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep305: Formula Foil World Championships
programme.desc: The Formula Foil World Championships from Saint Moritz, Switzerland.

programme.title: Blue World Ep507: Sand Tiger Sharks + Marine Biology in Turks Caicos
programme.desc: Blue World heads to North Carolina to observe how shipwrecks have become home to thousands of animals, including Sand Tiger sharks. But instead of chasing the fish, the sharks are protecting them! Then, we visit the School for Field Studies in the Turks Caicos Islands to learn how to tag sharks!

programme.title: Hot Water Ep104: V8 Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports. This episode features Round 4 of Jet Sprinting from Cabarita in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep110
programme.desc: Liquid Edge examines the subject of surf territorialism and the Aloha Spirit; the beauty and challenge of stand-up paddling in Tahiti; extreme whitewater kayaking. Included is an amazing look behind the scenes of the 3D movie adventure Storm Surfers, plus a spectacular kiteboarding sweet spot.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 4: No More Bubbles
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of Journey to a New Earth, Wes Carter of Atlantic Packaging talks with water photographer Clark Little, shaper Jon Pyzel, and big wave rider Kai Lenny. They join the journey, offering insights and solutions for the problematic issue of single-use plastics in the surf industry.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 5: Clean This Mess Up
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we talk with 11x World Surf League Champion, Kelly Slater, about the growing problem of plastic pollution around the world. We learn about the ways he’s chosen to make a difference with his company, Outerknown, and discuss the power of community to make real and lasting change.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 6: Jaws of Consumerism
programme.desc: Olympic Gold Medalist and 5x World Champion, Carissa Moore, shares how people and brands can eliminate single-use plastics. Juan Oliphant and Ocean Ramsey explain how shark populations are a crucial barometer for the health of our oceans. Florence Marine X talks sustainable solutions in packaging!

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 7: Decisions
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 8: Let’s Change This
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Nippow Holiday
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen invites the filmmaker and musician, Leo Cittadella, to join him and Rip Zinger on a powder trip to Hokkaido, Japan. Along the way, they meet up with Nicolas Müller and Mikkel Bang to film for the Absinthe Films feature "TurboDojo.”

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo One
programme.desc: On his 45th trip to Japan (since 1991), Terje rides powder in the Japanese Alps with the snowboarders Leo Cittadella, Rip Zinger, Curtis Ciszek, Oli Gittler and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Two
programme.desc: The snowboarders Rip Zinger and Terje Haakonsen ride powder in Japan. Years after his recovery from a debilitating head injury, they get Kevin Pearce back on snow. Join us for this episode of friendship, freshies, and freeriding.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Three
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen explores the joys of Japanese mountain culture with his friends Kevin Pearce, Mikkel Bang, Rip Zinger, Oli Gittler, Curtis Ciszek, Leo Cittadella and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Relax If You Can
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen and Leo Cittadella go snowskating at the vast Austrian ski resort of Ischgl. While enjoying a timeout along the Swiss-Austrian border, they discuss European cultural differences and similarities.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Half Banked at Mt Baker
programme.desc: Terje and Leo Cittadella head to Mt. Baker, Washington to meet up with with Russell Winfield and Rip Zinger to compete in the 33rd Legendary Banked Slalom. During a windstorm, a tree falls on the house while everyone is asleep. Terje gets waxing tips from Olympic gold medalist Seth Westcott.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Attunga - A Higher Place
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three Norwegian snowboarders: legendary purist Terje Haakonsen, holistic-minded Torgeir Bergrem, and carefree wunderkind Marcus Kleveland. Watch as filmmaker and snowboarder Seth Huot pulls back the curtain to examine their common purpose, potential, pitfalls, and paychecks.

programme.title: Marmoset Presents: Bridge City Revival
programme.desc: Bridge City Revival is the acclaimed music collective from Portland, Oregon. Inspired by the soulful 60s, BCR was raised on The Chi-Lites, Otis Redding, Isley Brothers, Lee Fields, and Sharon Jones. Banger drum breaks. Driving bass. Rhythmic guitar. Rolling keyboards. Soulful brass. That’s BCR!

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Titans of Business
programme.desc: There have been many stories and documentaries on the Bill Gates’, Steve Jobs’ and Henry Fords’ of the world. What about the thousands of other business people, that had a better idea or way to make life better, cheaper, and faster? People who started out from meager beginnings or limited education, to become very wealthy! Many of these people are among us and act no differently than we do, but they have a success story to tell and tricks of success to share. These are the people profiled in “Titans of Business”.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: En Route America
programme.desc: A road trip across the West Coast, following skiers as they explore iconic mountains and chase winter conditions across the United States.

programme.title: En Route Departure
programme.desc: Follow Pep Fujas, Blake Nyman, Anthony Boronowski, Dylan Hood, Eric Pollard, Chris Benchetler and more as they chase storms from a Top Secret Military Mountain Warfare Facility, to the Italian Alps.

programme.title: Falling Angels
programme.desc: Three female BASE jumpers trek deep into the Venezuelan jungle to attempt a historic jump from the world’s highest waterfall, facing extreme terrain, technical challenges, and one of the most dangerous exits in the sport.

programme.title: Gunnie Season
programme.desc: An extreme skiing film featuring some of the world’s top professional skiers pushing their limits on snow and steep terrain.

programme.title: Peace and Left

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

When he puts the mask on, everybody who looks on this mask commits suicide. He has created the Death-Mask.

Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 2

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 3
programme.desc: Laura Conz starts this episode making sure all students have their helmets on to avoid any accidents before teaching them regarding horses health and how to take care of their legs. programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Review

programme.title: 48 Horas de Terror
programme.desc: Mateo un escritor citadino adquiere una casa de campo en donde planea vivir con su esposa y escribir en la tranquilidad del campo, pero no tomo en cuenta las trágicas noticias de los acontecimientos de canibalismo que ocurrieron a manos de sus vecinos quienes solo buscan sacias su hambre.

programme.title: The Juniors y La Formula Imperial
programme.desc: Narra las vidas de 7 adolescentes millonarios que se aventuran a planificar una revolución social, generada por vídeo-escándalos y experimentos médicos, con el objetivo de generar un cambio en la ideología mundial, el conflicto entre las clases sociales y el enfrentamiento con sus muchachas de servicio doméstico.

programme.title: Mi Pequeña Pesadilla
programme.desc: Después de la terrible experiencia y la pérdida de sus amigos, Heather se ve obligada a regresar al Hotel Fear donde Travis se prepara para sus próximas víctimas.

programme.title: Borrar de la Memoria
programme.desc: Una historia de amor se transforma en una historia de persecuciones y asesinatos sin esclarecer en el contexto de la masacre estudiantil de octubre de 1968. Más de 40 años después, un periodista tenaz se da a la tarea de aclarar los crímenes bajo condiciones muy peligrosas, con el objetivo de llevar la verdad ante la justicia. Ello representa un esfuerzo dedicado a obligar a un país a reconocer la negación de la reconciliación y el cierre de trágicos acontecimientos políticos y sociales en su historia.

programme.title: Amar
programme.desc: Carlos quiere pero Susana no. Joel no quiere pero Patricia lo obliga. Gabriel lo espera pero Martha no se lo da. Amado lo busca con una gringa y lo pierde. Benito lo tiene toda la vida. Concha se lo lleva más allá del sistema solar. Todos lo quieren y todos lo dan pero unos no lo reciben y otros quieren más. Así es Amar.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
